---
title: "Relatório Abordagens participativas: Experiências no Maranhão, Mato Grosso e Rio de Janeiro"
subtitle: ""
draft: false
draft-mode: visible
date: "2026-02-27"
date-modified: "2026-02-27"
image: img/cover-pt.png
execute:
  echo: false
#citation:
#  url: in progress
lang: pt  
categories:
  - Workers Health
  - Climate change
  - Human Rights
  - Decent Work
  
author:
  - name: Isabel Domingos Martinez dos Santos
    url: https://www.clidewo.com/people/staff/Domingos.html
    affiliation: Universidade Federal Fluminense
    affiliation-url: https://www.uff.br
    orcid:  
  - name: Flávia de Almeida Moura
    url: https://www.clidewo.com/people/staff/Moura.html
    affiliation: Universidade Federal de Maranhão
    affiliation-url: https://portalpadrao.ufma.br
    orcid: 

  - name: Carla Reita Faria Leal 
    url: https://www.clidewo.com/people/staff/Reita.html
    affiliation: Universidade Federal Mato Grosso
    affiliation-url: https://www.uff.br
    orcid: 	
  - name: Ivi Tavares Abrahão Castillero
    url: https://www.clidewo.com/people/staff/Abrahao.html
    affiliation: Universidade Federal Fluminense
    affiliation-url: https://www.uff.br
  - name: Késley Gabriel Bezerra Coutinho
    url: https://www.clidewo.com/people/staff/Bezerra.html
    affiliation: Universidade Federal Mato Grosso
    affiliation-url: https://www.ufmt.br 
  - name: Laert Moraes
    url: https://www.clidewo.com/people/staff/Moraes.html
    affiliation: Universidade Federal de Maranhão
    affiliation-url: https://portalpadrao.ufma.br          
  - name: Ludmila Ribeiro Paiva
    url: https://www.clidewo.com/people/staff/Ribeiro.html
    affiliation: Universidade Federal Fluminense
    affiliation-url: https://www.uff.br
#    orcid: 0000-0003-0166-5066
  - name: Mariana Rosa Soares
    url: https://www.clidewo.com/people/staff/Rosa.html
    affiliation: Universidade Federal Mato Grosso
    affiliation-url: https://www.ufmt.br
  - name: Manuella Garcia de Freitas Gallego
    url: https://www.clidewo.com/people/staff/Garcia.html
    affiliation: Universidade Federal Fluminense
    affiliation-url: https://www.uff.br
  - name: Mayara Pinheiro Fortes Brandão
    url: https://www.clidewo.com/people/staff/Fortes.html
    affiliation: Universidade Federal de Maranhão
    affiliation-url: https://portalpadrao.ufma.br
  - name: Saulo Barros da Costa
    url: https://www.clidewo.com/people/staff/Barros.html
    affiliation: Universidade Federal de Maranhão
    affiliation-url: https://portalpadrao.ufma.br  


     
---

Informações detalhadas provenientes da pesquisa de campo, incluindo análises aprofundadas de variáveis socioeconômicas, produtivas e ambientais em nível municipal. Em conjunto, essas informações oferecem uma compreensão mais clara da dinâmica regional e apoiam a tomada de decisões baseada em evidências para o desenvolvimento de políticas e o planejamento estratégico.


<img
  src="img/cover-pt.png"
  style="width:100%; height:auto;"
  loading="lazy"
/>


### Download {.appendix}

{{< downloadthis img/tbd.pdf dname="Report participatory approach (PT)" label="Download the pdf" icon=file-earmark-pdf type=Warning >}}


#### Share it on social media:

```{=html}
<!-- AddToAny BEGIN -->
<div class="a2a_kit a2a_kit_size_32 a2a_default_style" data-a2a-icon-color="#FFDC02,black">

<a class="a2a_button_email a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_copy_link a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_linkedin a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_facebook a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_bluesky a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_x a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_threads a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_mastodon a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_whatsapp a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_dd a2a_counter" href="https://www.addtoany.com/share"></a>
</div>
<script async src="https://static.addtoany.com/menu/page.js"></script>
<!-- AddToAny END -->
```
